name: Indiana IEFS
scopeNote: Statewide IEFS baseline for Indiana trial, appellate, and tax courts. Appellate appendix volume/TOC rules are noted in research but deferred from this general filing-prep pack.
guidanceNote: These checks are guidance only — not legal advice…tell us at support@macrify.me

constraints.label: PDF-only filing format
constraints.authority: Indiana Office of Judicial Administration, E-filing User Guide, updated May 15, 2026

constraints.label: Document size cap
constraints.authority: Indiana Office of Judicial Administration, E-filing User Guide, updated May 15, 2026

constraints.label: Envelope size cap
constraints.authority: Indiana Office of Judicial Administration, E-filing User Guide, updated May 15, 2026

constraints.label: Filename length
constraints.authority: Indiana Office of Judicial Administration, E-filing User Guide, updated May 15, 2026
constraints.note: The 100-character limit includes spaces and the .pdf extension.

constraints.label: Encryption, passwords, and access limits
constraints.authority: Indiana Office of Judicial Administration, E-filing User Guide, updated May 15, 2026

constraints.label: Embedded files
constraints.authority: Indiana Office of Judicial Administration, E-filing User Guide, updated May 15, 2026

constraints.label: OCR for scanned documents
constraints.authority: Indiana Office of Judicial Administration, E-filing User Guide, updated May 15, 2026

constraints.label: Metadata removal for confidential filings
constraints.authority: Indiana Office of Judicial Administration, E-filing User Guide, updated May 15, 2026

constraints.label: PDF/A stance
constraints.authority: Indiana Office of Judicial Administration, E-filing User Guide, updated May 15, 2026
constraints.note: The guide's formatting section is silent on PDF/A.

pdfa.authority: Indiana Office of Judicial Administration, E-filing User Guide, updated May 15, 2026
pdfa.note: The guide's document-formatting section does not mention PDF/A, ISO 19005, or archival PDF.

activeContent.authority: Indiana Office of Judicial Administration, E-filing User Guide, updated May 15, 2026
activeContent.note: The guide prohibits information that cannot be readily viewed in PDF software, but it does not state a separate JavaScript or active-content rule.

encryption.authority: Indiana Office of Judicial Administration, E-filing User Guide, updated May 15, 2026
encryption.note: The guide's prohibited-items list bars encryption, password protection, and other features that limit access.

embeddedFiles.authority: Indiana Office of Judicial Administration, E-filing User Guide, updated May 15, 2026
embeddedFiles.note: The guide's prohibited-items list bars embedded files.

metadataScrub.condition: when the filing contains confidential/redacted information
metadataScrub.authority: Indiana Office of Judicial Administration, E-filing User Guide, updated May 15, 2026
metadataScrub.note: The guide requires filers to ensure confidential information cannot be recovered and says confidential information must not remain in document properties/metadata.

ocr.authority: Indiana Office of Judicial Administration, E-filing User Guide, updated May 15, 2026
ocr.note: The guide instructs filers to always apply OCR when scanning documents.

flattenForms.authority: Indiana Office of Judicial Administration, E-filing User Guide, updated May 15, 2026
flattenForms.note: The guide does not state a fillable-form flattening rule in the general filing constraints researched for this pack.
